description_long: This object is a sleek, metallic airplane with a streamlined fuselage and sharply swept-back wings, reminiscent of a military jet. The wings are mid-mounted and feature a pronounced sweep, giving the aircraft a fast, agile appearance. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer, forming a conventional tail design. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a transparent canopy, likely accommodating a single pilot. The landing gear is visible, with a tricycle configuration consisting of a nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings. The exterior is finished in shades of gray and silver, with subtle panel lines and aerodynamic contours.
description: A streamlined, metallic jet airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, a single vertical tail, and a forward enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the swept-back wings, single vertical tail, and forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and symmetrical wing sweep.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the landing gear, wing sweep, and tail structure.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the full wingspan, tailplane, and cockpit placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and no visible winglets; moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a transparent canopy.
